use_cases: Form field for selecting options from a dropdown menu with smooth animations
Filtering interface for e-commerce or data tables
Settings panel option selection in SaaS applications
User preference selection with visual feedback
ai_summary: A custom animated select dropdown component with smooth AnimatePresence transitions and click-outside-to-close functionality. Built with motion/react for fluid animations, it clones child elements to inject selection handlers and manages internal state for display text and selected index. Features a clean, flat visual style suitable for modern web applications.
